q: Which of the following polymer is used in the manufacture of wood laminates ?
question: Which of the following polymer is used in the manufacture of wood laminates ?
solution:
Urea-formaldehyde (UF) resin, one of the most important formaldehyde resin adhesives, is a polymeric condensation product of formaldehyde with urea, and being widely used for the manufacture of wood-based composite panels, such as plywood, particleboard, and fiberboard.

Urea -HCHO resin is used in manufacture of wood laminates.

HCP structure : Per atom, there will be one octahedral void (OV) and two tetrahedral voids (TV).

= Mass  Molar Mass ×NA=0.581 g70 g/mol×6.023×1023

=3×0.58170×6.023×1023=14.99×1021

question:
At 25°C,50 g of iron reacts with HCl to form FeCl2. The evolved hydrogen gas expands against a constant pressure of 1 bar. The work done by the gas during this expansion is -_______ J.

(Round off to the Nearest Integer)

[Given : R=8.314 J mol-1 K-1. Assume, hydrogen is an ideal gas]

[Atomic mass off Fe is 55.85 u]
solution:
T=298 K, R=8.314 JmolK

→ Chemical reaction is  

Fe50g+2HCl→FeCl2P=1 bar+H2g

=5055.85 mol

→ Work done for 1 mol gas

=-Pext×ΔV

=ΔngRT

=-1×8.314×298 J

→ Work done for 5055.85 mol of gas

=-8.314×298×5055.85 J

=-2218.059 J

≃-2218 J

question: A large block of wood of mass M=5.99 kg is hanging from two long massless cords. A bullet of mass m=10 g is fired into the block and gets embedded in it. The (block + bullet) then swing upwards, their center of mass rising a vertical distance h=9.8 cm before the (block + bullet) pendulum comes momentarily to rest at the end of its arc. solution:
From energy conservation,

[after bullet gets embedded till the system comes momentarily at rest]

M+mgh=12M+mv12
[v1 is velocity after collision] 

∴ v1=2σh

Applying momentum conservation, (just before and just after collision)

mv=M+mv1

v=M+mmv1=610×10-3×2×9.8×9.8×10-2

≈831.55 m s-1
